URL.title: Tautulli URL
URL.description: The URL of the Tautulli instance

APIKey.title: Tautulli API key
APIKey.description: The API key for the Tautulli instance

UseSelfSignedCert.title: Use self-signed certificate
UseSelfSignedCert.description: Whether to use a self-signed certificate for the Tautulli instance (ignore SSL warnings)

RefreshSeconds.title: Activity data refresh interval
RefreshSeconds.description: How often, in seconds, the bot pulls new live activity data. A 5-second minimum is built-in; it's for your own good

TerminateMessage.title: Stream termination message
TerminateMessage.description: The message to send when a stream is terminated

Discord.title: Discord configuration
Discord.description: Settings for the Discord bot and server

BotToken.title: Discord bot token
BotToken.description: The token for the Discord bot

ServerID.title: Discord server ID
ServerID.description: The ID of the Discord server where the bot will be used

AdminIDs.title: Admin IDs
AdminIDs.description: The IDs of the Discord users who will have admin permissions

PostSummaryMessage.title: Post summary message
PostSummaryMessage.description: Whether to post a summary message in the activity summary channel

AdminChannelName.title: Activity summary channel name
AdminChannelName.description: The name of the channel where the bot will post activity messages. It's recommended that this be an admin-only channel.

PostRecentlyAddedMessage.title: Post recently added message
PostRecentlyAddedMessage.description: Whether to post a poster carousel of recently-added content in the announcements channel

PublicChannelName.title: Announcements channel name
PublicChannelName.description: The name of the channel where the bot will post announcement messages. This can be a public channel.

EnableSlashCommands.title: Enable slash commands
EnableSlashCommands.description: Whether to enable slash commands for the bot

StatusMessage.title: Bot Discord activity status
StatusMessage.description: Settings regarding the bot's Discord status/activity

Enable.title: Enable bot activity status
Enable.description: Whether to enable the bot's activity status

CustomMessage.title: Custom activity status message
CustomMessage.description: Display a custom activity status message. Overrides default if not-empty

ShowStreamCount.title: Show active stream count
ShowStreamCount.description: Whether to display current active stream count in activity status message

Display.title: Display configuration
Display.description: Settings for how the bot displays information

HideETA.title: Hide ETA
HideETA.description: Whether to hide ETAs for streams

HidePlatforms.title: Hide platforms
HidePlatforms.description: Whether to hide stream platform information

HidePlayerNames.title: Hide player names
HidePlayerNames.description: Whether to hide stream player names

HideQuality.title: Hide quality
HideQuality.description: Whether to hide stream quality information

HideTranscode.title: Hide transcode
HideTranscode.description: Whether to hide stream transcoding information

ServerName.title: Server name
ServerName.description: The name of the Plex server

ThousandsSeparator.title: Thousands separator
ThousandsSeparator.description: The character to use as a numerical thousands separator

Time.title: Time settings
Time.description: Settings for how the bot handles time

UseFriendlyNames.title: Use friendly names
UseFriendlyNames.description: Whether to use Plex user names instead of Plex usernames

AllowAnalytics.title: Allow analytics
AllowAnalytics.description: Whether to allow the bot to collect and send analytics data

Stats.title: Stats configuration
Stats.description: Settings for the bot's stat tracking features (via voice channels)

CategoryName.title: Category name
CategoryName.description: The name of the category for activity stats

StatTypes.title: Stat types
StatTypes.description: The types of activity stats to track

PlexServerAvailability.title: Plex server availability
PlexServerAvailability.description: Settings for Plex server availability stats

CategoryName.title: Category name
CategoryName.description: The name of the category for library stats

RefreshSeconds.title: Library data refresh interval
RefreshSeconds.description: How often, in seconds, the bot pulls new library data. A 5-minute minimum is built-in; it's for your own good

CategoryName.title: Category name
CategoryName.description: The name of the category for performance stats

discordTextChannelName.$comment: Cannot contain spaces or uppercase letters
discordTextChannelName.description: A Discord text channel name. No emojis allowed.

discordVoiceChannelName.description: A Discord voice channel name. No emojis allowed.

discordCategoryName.description: A Discord category name. No emojis allowed.

CustomName.description: The custom name to use for the voice channel (overrides the default name)

CustomEmoji.description: The custom emoji to use for the voice channel (overrides the default emoji)

Enable.description: Whether to enable the voice channel

VoiceChannelID.description: The ID of the voice channel

CustomName.description: The custom name to use for the voice channel (overrides the default name)

CustomEmoji.description: The custom emoji to use for the voice channel (overrides the default emoji)

Enable.description: Whether to enable the voice channel

VoiceChannelID.description: The ID of the voice channel

Hours.description: The number of hours to look back for recently added items

Name.description: The name of the library as it appears in Plex

ID.description: The ID of the library as it appears in Tautulli. Use if the library name is not unique

AlternateName.description: An alternate name for the library (used as the voice channel name)

Albums.description: Settings for the voice channel about album information (used if the library is a music library)

Artists.description: Settings for the voice channel about artist information (used if the library is a music library)

Episodes.description: Settings for the voice channel about episode information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Movies.description: Settings for the voice channel about movie information (used if the library is a movie library)

Series.description: Settings for the voice channel about series/show information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Seasons.description: Settings for the voice channel about season information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Tracks.description: Settings for the voice channel about track information (used if the library is a music library)

RecentlyAdded.description: Settings for the voice channel about recently added items

Name.description: The name of the library as it appears in Tautulli

ID.description: The ID of the library as it appears in Tautulli. Use if the library name is not unique

Name.description: The name for the combined library (used as the voice channel name)

Albums.description: Settings for the voice channel about album information (used if the library is a music library)

Artists.description: Settings for the voice channel about artist information (used if the library is a music library)

Episodes.description: Settings for the voice channel about episode information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Movies.description: Settings for the voice channel about movie information (used if the library is a movie library)

Series.description: Settings for the voice channel about series/show information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Seasons.description: Settings for the voice channel about season information (used if the library is a TV show library)

Tracks.description: Settings for the voice channel about track information (used if the library is a music library)

RecentlyAdded.description: Settings for the voice channel about recently added items
